A

addPerson(String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String) - Method in class dataaccess.PersonDao
Adds a new person to the database
addUser(String, String, String, String, String, String) - Method in class dataaccess.UserDao
Adds a user to the database
associatedUsername - Variable in class model.Event
User (Username) to which this person belongs
associatedUsername - Variable in class model.Person
User (Username) to which this person belongs
associatedUsername - Variable in class result.EventIDResult
Name of the user account this person belongs to
associatedUsername - Variable in class result.PersonIDResult
Name of the user account this person belongs to
authToken - Variable in class model.AuthToken
Unique generated auth token for this user's session
authToken - Variable in class result.LoginResult
Non-empty auth token
authToken - Variable in class result.RegisterResult
Non-empty auth token string
AuthToken - Class in model
Represents an auth token in the database
AuthToken(String, String) - Constructor for class model.AuthToken
 
AuthTokenDao - Class in dataaccess
Handles all database operations for persons
AuthTokenDao() - Constructor for class dataaccess.AuthTokenDao
